positive: A symmetrical, central composition of bioluminescent flora interwoven with celestial nebula elements. The primary palette features deep indigo, sapphire blue, and matte blacks, dramatically contrasted by glowing emerald green, electric cyan, and amethyst highlights. The style is a blend of ornate stained-glass mandala patterning and Art Nouveau organic geometry. Intricate detail, clean linework, and defined silhouettes are crucial. The composition must feel highly stylized, suitable for screen printing or silkscreen transfer on apparel. Cinematic volumetric lighting, crisp edges, vector art aesthetics, highly detailed, high contrast.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, artifact, watermark, text, signature, noise, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, faded, monochrome, gradient blur, messy, asymmetrical
